arts.sum: Getafe are on a strong run of form, failing to lose in their last five games. Sevilla haven't kept a clean sheet in their previous five fixtures, but they've won their last three clashes against Geta...

arts.ttl: Preview: Getafe vs. Sevilla - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Getafe and Sevilla, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
